data.content:
Now I have the full picture. Let me create the `Directory.Packages.props` and update all project files.

**Version conflicts resolved (highest wins):**
- `System.Text.Json`: 10.0.1 (vs 8.0.4)
- `Azure.Identity`: 1.13.2 (vs 1.11.4)

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have the full picture. Let me identify all packages and their versions across projects:

| Package | Api | Worker | Shared | Tests |
|---------|-----|--------|--------|-------|
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 | 8.0.4 | 10.0.1 | 10.0.1 |
| Azure.Identity | 1.13.2 | - | 1.11.4 | - |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | - | 8.0.1 | - | - |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | - | 1.15.0 | - | - |


| xunit | - | - | - | 2.9.3 |

I've spotted version conflicts that need resolving: System.Text.Json has 10.0.1 and 8.0.4 in different projects, and Azure.Identity varies between 1.13.2 and 1.11.4. I'll consolidate by using the highest versions across the board. My plan is to create a central package management file at the solution root with all packages pinned to their highest versions, then strip out the individual version declarations from each project file.

    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.content:
Done. Here's what was changed:

**Created** `Directory.Packages.props` with all 5 packages centralized, resolving two version conflicts by picking the highest:
- `System.Text.Json` → **10.0.1** (was 8.0.4 in Worker)
- `Azure.Identity` → **1.13.2** (was 1.11.4 in Shared)

**Updated** all 4 `.csproj` files to remove `Version` attributes from `PackageReference` elements.
